snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS-first Note Agent current-note production UI integration exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 11-path renderer candidate after blocker review, and UI Design independently reproduced its hashes and accepted all 18 UI tests. Planning changed only existing owner, evidence, semantic and review artifacts, never those frozen bytes.

dimensions.summary: The UI owner now locates the exact current-note panel, scoped timeline/follow-up, truthful wait/egress states and fail-closed unavailable actions while the published service remains the interface owner.

UI, Context, Job and service owners agree on exact vault/page isolation, sequenced model mutation, provisional revocation, same-Job wait recovery, current-action egress and authoritative final citations.
One exact UI selector projects only to existing partial Job/Pi/E6.03 rows; semantic lock v3 has 1,223 claims while PIGE-UI-005/E6.06 and every Requirement, Exit and Phase status remain unchanged.
The exact integration has focused 10-file/284-test, typecheck, build and development-launch evidence plus UI Design 18/18 acceptance; full verify is the single Planning publication checkpoint.
No document or decision is added; three concise owner updates, one selector and semantic-neutral compression keep every fixed budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate Note Agent UI integration evidence
verification.evidence: Development ran focused 10 files/284 tests, typecheck, build and development-launch smoke; UI Design independently reproduced exact 2ca06e40/0bc6b75e identities and accepted 18/18 UI tests.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract passes unchanged; semantic lock v3/1,223 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with Requirement, Exit and Phase states unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Note Agent current-note production UI integration
coordination.compatibility: The candidate mechanically binds the production renderer to the published exact current_note conversation, Job, runtime and model-egress contract; no service, IPC, schema, dependency, permission, storage, mutation or Operation change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 2ca06e40/0bc6b75e bytes after blocker review and UI Design acceptance. Planning bound only existing UI/quality/playbook owners, evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing the 11 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: PIGE-UI-005 and E6.06 remain planned: selection, related/backlink expansion, memory, attachments, mutation, Activity/Undo, proposals, Operations and exceptional review remain open.
No exact real macOS raster is claimed because the review session was locked; PR CI plus macOS arm64 package/downloaded-distribution is the next complete publication node.
Windows/Linux qualification remains deferred under macOS-first sequencing with no platform claim.
